content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1756731000:F>进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月15日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 活动「夏日纪行」的购买截止时间和活动结束时间延长至 10 月 6 日。
● 活动「黑阳垂照的永夏」的结束时间延长至 10 月 6 日。
● 修复了唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」部分情况下手牌「活焰」特效不显示的问题。

V2.3.1.6 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1756731000:F> . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on September 15, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● The purchase deadline and event end time for the "Summer Archives" event have been extended to October 6.
● The end time of the event "Eternal Summer under the Black Sun" has been extended to October 6.
● Fixed the issue where the Command Card "Fiamma" effect for the Awakener "Kathigu-Ra" did not display in certain situations.
